prompt: On the island of Velmara, every inhabitant is either a knight (who always tells the truth) or a knave (who always lies). You meet two inhabitants, Marisol and Dario. Marisol says: "Marisol and Dario are both knaves." Exactly one of the two is a knight. Which one is the knight? Answer with exactly one name (Marisol or Dario) inside \boxed{}.
How many integers from 1 to 84 inclusive are divisible by 6? Put the final answer (a single integer) inside \boxed{}.
